The '''Bormterrans''' were four-armed, fearsome, loyal, dragon-like, reptiloid sapients indigenous to [[Bormter]]. They were fierce melee combatants, which made them perfect for recruitment into [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Delurin]]'s [[Dragon trooper (Bormterran)|dragon troopers]]. Being from a primitive culture, they were not very comfortable with advanced technology but adapted to using it. They grew to an average height of 1.9 meters.
